'''HoloNet Free Republic''' was a [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] communications organization funded by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], HoloNet Free Republic transmitted [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] feeds of pro-Alliance [[Propaganda/Legends|propaganda]] to [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]-held [[Star system/Legends|star systems]]. To repressed beings or Alliance sympathizers, HoloNet Free Republic's transmissions were a source of hope.
